head_commit.message:
fix: folder/drive not opening + folder lock — both getting generic fallback

Added KB entries:
- Folder/C drive not open: Windows+E, restart Explorer, laptop restart
- Folder lock: IT admin required (admin rights) → ticket
- Typo handling: foldar→folder, look→lock context match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: complete proactive audit — 16 issues fixed

Phone numbers:
- Removed 9654244281 from theft system prompt (teaches AI to give number)
- Removed 9654244281 from WIOM FACTS (AI context leak risk)

Step count fixes (max 4 rule):
- Overheating: 5 steps → 3 steps (both getKBFallback + getKBAnswer)
- HDMI/Projector: 5 steps → 4 steps

detectIntent() hint fixes:
- NETWORK_CONNECTED: restart contradiction removed, max steps added
- SOFTWARE_SPECIFIC: %appdata% Teams path removed
- PERFORMANCE: max 3 steps rule added
- SOFTWARE: Outlook redirect instruction added

getKBFallback fixes:
- Teams: removed Win+R → %appdata% path → ticket instead
- Keyboard: Win+R → osk → Start menu search approach
- Gmail: removed step 4 (account switch — unrealistic)

Tone fixes:
- Fan noise: 'toh batao' → proper 'type karo *ha*' ticket trigger
- WiFi password: 'Connect ho gaya? Koi aur help chahiye?' → professional
- Hallucination fallback: 'Koi baat nahi! 😊' → 'Samajh gaya. IT team ko bhejte hain'

Hard filter additions:
- Dekho, Achha suno, Haan yaar stripped
- %appdata%, cleanmgr, services.msc stripped if AI generates them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Safe Mode/Diagnostic Tool/F8 — IT admin only, not for employees

- KB entry: Safe Mode/Diagnostic Tool queries → 'IT ka kaam hai, ticket raise karo'
- Hard filter: strips Safe Mode/F8/Diagnostic Tool from any AI response
- Generic fallback: English → Hinglish, more helpful
- Windows Diagnosis screen → simple restart + IT ticket (no F8/Safe Mode)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: laptop automatic off/on — remove battery step, simple 3-step response

Wrong: 'Battery remove karo' (sealed battery), power settings advanced config
Correct: table pe rakho (airflow), Task Manager heavy apps, charger check
Then: HIGH priority IT ticket if still happening

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Gemini Vision for screenshot analysis

Employee sends screenshot → bot downloads image → Gemini 1.5 Flash
analyzes it → gives specific error diagnosis + simple fix steps

Flow: Gemini Vision (primary) → Claude Vision (fallback if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set) → text fallback
- Non-technical steps only (no CMD, no Device Manager)
- Phone number filter applied to vision responses too
- Hinglish response with ticket offer if IT admin needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
